_instructions: Copy to NWK_STORY_ROOT/config/storytoolkitai.json. Point engine_path at an existing StoryToolkitAI install. Do not rewrite or fork the engine. Derived caches stay under NWK_STORY_ROOT.
notes: Preferred: reuse existing package tree via engine_path
Optional later: clone/install full STAI into local_slot under story-system if external path is unstable
All transcripts/proxies/indexes must remain under NWK_STORY_ROOT, never inside source footage roots
